name: Ionian Boots of Lucidity
simpleDescription: Increases Move Speed and Cooldown Reduction

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Ionian Insight is a permanent passive stat grant that increases summoner spell haste by 10 while equipped.
Player-visible behavior: the haste bonus is always active and has no trigger, stack, or cast requirement.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Ionian Boots of Lucidity
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Ionian Insight summoner-spell-haste value and always-on passive execution behavior
